global.description: The ad features a full canvas background with a prominent VantaStyle logo positioned in the top left. The central focus is on the headline 'Flash sale live' and the body text 'Free shipping over $25', both centered for visibility. A call-to-action button 'Start now' is located at the bottom center. Decorative elements enhance the visual appeal without overwhelming the main message.
global.visual_style: Modern flat design with vibrant colors
global.main_message: Promoting a flash sale with free shipping on orders over $25.

elements.label: VantaStyle text logo
elements.description: The brand name 'VantaStyle' displayed prominently at the top left corner of the ad.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: Supporting descriptive text below the headline.

elements.label: Call to Action Button
elements.description: A button with action text located at the bottom of the ad crop.

elements.label: Decorative shapes
elements.description: Two rectangular shapes with diagonal lines, positioned in the upper left section of the crop.

elements.label: Segmented crop of a design element
elements.description: A segmented crop showing a rectangular shape with a diagonal line, likely part of a design element in the ad.

elements.label: Segmented crop of a decorative element
elements.description: A blue rectangular shape with a diagonal line, likely part of the background or design.
